name: Chocolate Pudding Cake (La. Times)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream shortening and sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add melted chocolate and eggs. Beat well.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the chocolate mixture with buttermilk, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square cake pan.
7. Cover loosely with foil.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
Each serving contains: 475 calories; 164 mg sodium; 72 mg cholesterol; 25 grams fat; 60 grams carbohydrates; 7 grams protein; 0.32 gram fiber.
